title: Quanta Services Named 2023 Top Solar Contractor by Solar Power World
text: Quanta Operating Companies Collaborate to Achieve Solar Industry Top Spot and Historic Milestone HOUSTON , July 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE:PWR) announced today that it has been named the top solar infrastructure solutions provider in the United States by Solar Power World . This achievement was made possible by the collaborative work of three Quanta operating companies: Blattner Company, RP Construction Services (RPCS) and The Ryan Company.

title: 3 Renewable Energy Stocks Set to Skyrocket by 2030

title: Quanta Services: Savvy Investments Back Solid Future Results
text: Quanta Services, Inc. has seen strong growth due to the ongoing energy transition, with a total return of approximately 524% over the past five years and around 51% over the past year. The company's aggressive expansion plans, including acquisitions such as Blattner Holding Company and RPCS, have increased its exposure to the renewable energy market and positioned it to capitalize on the shift to renewable energy sources. Despite trading at a premium, PWR's past performance and future projections justify the higher multiples, with a price target of about $230 per share representing approximately a 15% upside.

title: QUANTA SERVICES ANNOUNCES SECOND QUARTER 2023 EARNINGS RELEASE & CONFERENCE CALL SCHEDULE
text: HOUSTON , July 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) announced today that it will release second quarter 2023 financial results on Thursday, August 3, 2023, before the market opens. In conjunction with the press release, Quanta has scheduled a conference call and webcast for 9:00 a.m.
